cast.name: 索菲娅·莱贝德娃 Sofya Lebedeva
丽扎·波亚尔斯卡娅 Elizaveta Boyarskaya
阿尔焦姆·贝斯特罗夫 Artyom Bystrov

introduction: Anna is a successful plastic surgeon and head of a clinic, she is happily married. In her verified world of ideal people, there is no place for other people's mistakes and weaknesses. The only one who stands out from this world is her informal daughter, who does not want to live up to her mother's high standards. When Anna's husband gets into an accident with his mistress, the famous blogger and singer Zhenya, Anna realizes the instability of her reality and chooses a destructive path of revenge, which will lead to unpredictable consequences.
